title: Simple-ish Firearms
description: A decently sized mod including multiple forms of firearms throughout history.
body:
A small-ish mod containing multiple firearms throughout history, from pistols to rifles, including an ore for some funny future stuff. Even with 3D models.
This mod currently includes:
Flintlock Pistol
Musket
Longrifle
8px S(imple)B(ullet)
12px SB
Plastic Remnant
Plastic Ingot
and finally...
Plastic Block
